Apr 8, 2026

About TWPA

True Wisdom Practitioners Association (TWPA) is a welcoming space for all who are drawn to the timeless wisdom of the East. Based in Oceania, we bring together practitioners and curious minds to explore the depths of Buddhist and Chan teachings.

Our Mission

We are dedicated to upholding the authentic teachings of Buddhism, fostering peace of mind, and benefiting all sentient beings. Through lectures, workshops, and courses, we seek to make the wisdom of the Dharma widely accessible to all those with an affinity for it, guiding participants to embody Buddhist practice in their daily lives and deepen their understanding of Buddhism and Chan culture.

What We Explore

Our blog and community delve into topics that bridge ancient wisdom with modern life:

  • Mindful living and meditation practices
  • Plant-based wellness and conscious eating
  • Emotional well-being through Buddhist psychology
  • Chan (Zen) teachings and their practical application
  • Community events, retreats, and dharma gatherings in Australia and New Zealand

Join Us

Whether you are a seasoned practitioner or simply curious about the path, you are welcome here. Subscribe to our newsletter to stay connected, or reach out to us at contact@twpa.info.

© 2026 True Wisdom Practitioners Association

Cultivating mindful living through the timeless wisdom of the East.
